# AI Benchmark Hub

> Independent, transparent AI model benchmark library covering GPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Gemini 1.5 Pro, Llama 3.1, and other major LLMs. Pricing, performance, and compliance data sourced from public references.

## Sections

- /en/models/ — All AI model pages with pricing, benchmarks, and compliance data
- /zh/models/ — Chinese version of model pages
- /en/comparisons/ — Head-to-head model comparisons with FAQ and editorial verdicts
- /zh/comparisons/ — Chinese version of comparisons
- /en/benchmarks/ — Benchmark test descriptions (MMLU, HumanEval, GSM8K, MATH, BBH)
- /zh/benchmarks/ — Chinese version of benchmarks

## Top Models

- GPT-4o: OpenAI flagship, multimodal (text/image/audio), 128K context, $2.50/$10 per Mtok — /en/models/gpt-4o/
- Claude 3.5 Sonnet: Anthropic flagship, 200K context, $3.00/$15 per Mtok — /en/models/claude-3-5-sonnet/
- Gemini 1.5 Pro: Google flagship, 2M context, $1.25/$5 per Mtok — /en/models/gemini-1-5-pro/
- Llama 3.1 405B: Meta open-weights, self-hostable — /en/models/llama-3-1-405b/
- DeepSeek V3: DeepSeek open-weights, MoE, $0.27/$1.10 per Mtok — /en/models/deepseek-v3/

## Top Comparisons

- GPT-4o vs Claude 3.5 Sonnet — /en/comparisons/gpt-4o-vs-claude-3-5-sonnet/
- GPT-4o vs Gemini 1.5 Pro — /en/comparisons/gpt-4o-vs-gemini-1-5-pro/
- Claude 3.5 Sonnet vs Llama 3.1 405B — /en/comparisons/claude-3-5-sonnet-vs-llama-3-1-405b/

## Benchmarks

- MMLU — 57-subject multiple-choice knowledge evaluation
- HumanEval — 164 Python programming tasks (pass@1)
- GSM8K — Grade-school math word problems
- MATH — Competition-level mathematics
- BBH — Big-Bench Hard reasoning tasks

## Data Source

- Benchmark data sourced from Hugging Face and Papers with Code.
- Pricing data sourced from vendor official documentation, verified monthly.
- Compliance data sourced from vendor trust centers and official documentation.

## Notes

- All scores are sourced from public vendor announcements and academic papers.
- Pricing is per 1 million tokens (Mtok) unless otherwise noted.
- This site is not affiliated with or endorsed by any AI vendor.
- OpenAI®, ChatGPT®, GPT® are trademarks of OpenAI; Claude® is a trademark of Anthropic; Gemini® is a trademark of Google; Llama® is a trademark of Meta.
